title: fscanf into structures generates invalid C++ code

features.name: fscanf write to packed struct member
features.description: Code should include $fscanf system function writing into a member of a packed struct via dot notation

features.name: packed struct with logic members
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed containing logic bit-field members

features.name: fopen file handle for fscanf
features.description: Code should include $fopen system function to open a file handle for reading
